title: North Korea test-fires cluster-bomb tactical ballistic missiles
summary: North Korea launched five tactical ballistic missiles with cluster bomb warheads toward a target area 136 km away, supervised by Kim Jong-un.
contents:
## North Korea test-fires cluster-bomb tactical ballistic missiles

### Overview
North Korea launched five tactical ballistic missiles with cluster bomb warheads toward a target area 136 km away, supervised by Kim Jong-un.

### Details
North Korea's KCNA reported the test evaluated the Hwasongpho-11 Ra missile's warhead power, striking a 12.5-13 hectare area with high density. Kim Jong-un highlighted boosted high-density striking capability against specific targets. South Korea's Joint Chiefs detected missiles flying about 140 km into the East Sea and conducts analysis with the US.

### Geographic context
Location: East Sea, North Korea.
